tool_input.command:
cat knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for s in data.get('sections', []):
    if s['id'] in ['s9', 's7']:
        print(f'=== {s[\"id\"]}: {s[\"title\"]} ===')
        print(s.get('content', '')[:3000])
        print()
"
